entities.description: emmc is a type of memory chip connected to the cpu via a dedicated interface  described as compatible with specific configurations
cpu is a component that provides a dedicated emmc interface for connecting the emmc chip

relations.description: the cpu provides a dedicated emmc interface for connecting to the emmc chip
the cpu uses an 8 bit data line to communicate with the emmc chip
the emmc chip is connected to the cpu via an 8 bit data line
